Notice Of Hearing On Petition And Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jan-19-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Francesca M. Lanpher of the law offices of Keesal Young & Logan (415.398.6000) appears as counsel for petitioners

Mohammad Yazdi (415.239.8402) appears In Propria Personal as respondent

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

Petitioners E*Trade Securities LLC and Christopher Peters' petition to confirm arbitration award against respondent Mohammad Yazdi is granted. No opposition filed. Written order and Judgment are signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D302)
